FSCM_GEN4_470_Programmstand_x309_02.00.17.ddt

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7E3
Recv ID: 7EB
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 09
Func Name: MC HEV FSCM

    "version": "0000"
